requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (Bomba) Approval and UBBL 1984 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——马来西亚消防与救援局（Bomba）审批及UBBL 1984要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——馬來西亞消防與救援局（Bomba）審批及UBBL 1984要求

summary.en: Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (Bomba — Fire and Rescue Department of Malaysia) is the fire safety authority having jurisdiction for building fire safety approvals in Malaysia, under the Fire Services Act 1988 (Act 341). Bomba fire-safety approval is a mandatory project gate for all commercial and industrial facilities, including BESS installations. The Uniform Building By-Laws 1984 (UBBL 1984) — made under the Street, Drainage and Building Act 1974 — sets minimum fire-safety requirements for buildings in Peninsular Malaysia (Sabah and Sarawak have separate building laws). Bomba's technical references include MS 1183 (Code of Practice for Fire Protection — various parts), and NFPA codes may be referenced in project specifications for stationary BESS. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal Bomba adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date — direct Bomba verification is required before project design is finalised. For utility-scale BESS installations, Bomba plan scrutiny and Certificate of Completion and Compliance (CCC) from local authorities are required. A Bomba-accredited fire-protection engineer should be engaged for design review and submission.
summary.zh: 马来西亚消防与救援局（Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia，Bomba）是依据1988年《消防服务法》（第341法令）负责建筑消防安全审批的主管机关。Bomba消防安全审批是所有商业及工业设施——包括BESS装置——的强制项目门槛。依据1974年《街道、排水及建筑法》制定的《统一建筑附例1984》（UBBL 1984）规定了半岛马来西亚建筑的最低消防安全要求（沙巴和沙捞越另有单独建筑法律）。Bomba的技术参考包括MS 1183（消防规范——各部分），NFPA规范可能在固定式BESS项目规格中引用。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装规范；截至本数据集日期，Bomba专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认——须在项目设计最终确定前直接向Bomba核实。公用事业规模BESS装置须经Bomba图纸审查及地方当局颁发竣工合规证书（CCC）。应聘请Bomba认可消防工程师进行设计审查和申请提交。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞消防與救援局（Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia，Bomba）是依據1988年《消防服務法》（第341法令）負責建築消防安全審批的主管機關。Bomba消防安全審批是所有商業及工業設施——包括BESS裝置——的強制項目門檻。依據1974年《街道、排水及建築法》制定的《統一建築附例1984》（UBBL 1984）規定了半島馬來西亞建築的最低消防安全要求（沙巴和沙撈越另有單獨建築法律）。Bomba的技術參考包括MS 1183（消防規範——各部分），NFPA規範可能在固定式BESS項目規格中引用。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝規範；截至本數據集日期，Bomba專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認——須在項目設計最終確定前直接向Bomba核實。公用事業規模BESS裝置須經Bomba圖紙審查及地方當局頒發竣工合規證書（CCC）。應聘請Bomba認可消防工程師進行設計審查和申請提交。

standards_or_laws: Fire Services Act 1988 (Act 341) — Malaysia statutory basis for Bomba fire-safety jurisdiction
Uniform Building By-Laws 1984 (UBBL 1984) — minimum fire-safety requirements for buildings in Peninsular Malaysia (made under Street, Drainage and Building Act 1974)
MS 1183 — Malaysian Standard: Code of Practice for Fire Protection (various parts; Bomba technical reference)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; Bomba formal adoption specifically for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Bomba)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules (mandatory, effective August 1, 2025). GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Bomba as equivalent to Malaysia's UBBL 1984 and NFPA-referenced fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with documentation aligned to Malaysian requirements for Bomba project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定（强制性，自2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查依据《中华人民共和国消防法》由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被Bomba认可为等同于马来西亚UBBL 1984及NFPA参考消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在Bomba项目审查中补充符合马来西亚要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定（強制性，自2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查依據《中華人民共和國消防法》由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被Bomba認可為等同於馬來西亞UBBL 1984及NFPA參考消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在Bomba項目審查中補充符合馬來西亞要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Bomba fire-safety installation approval is a mandatory project gate for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Malaysia. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Bomba's requirements under UBBL 1984 and Malaysian fire codes. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with Bomba the applicable fire code and standard for stationary BESS installations — including whether NFPA 855 or MS 1183 (or a local adaptation) applies — and determine any Malaysia-specific requirements or additional conditions; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with Bomba requirements — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, fire suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by an accredited laboratory acceptable to Bomba; (d) engage a Bomba-registered fire protection engineer (Jurutera Keselamatan Kebakaran) for design review and application submission; (e) obtain CCC sign-off from local authority (Pihak Berkuasa Tempatan) before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：Bomba消防安全安装审批是马来西亚所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足Bomba依据UBBL 1984和马来西亚消防规范的要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向Bomba确认固定式BESS装置适用的消防规范和标准——包括是否适用NFPA 855或MS 1183（或本地改编版本）——并确定任何马来西亚专项要求或附加条件；（b）准备符合Bomba要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、消防抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防抑制系统设备经Bomba认可实验室认证；（d）聘请Bomba注册消防工程师（Jurutera Keselamatan Kebakaran）进行设计审查和申请提交；（e）在调试前取得地方当局（Pihak Berkuasa Tempatan）竣工合规证书（CCC）。
gap.zht: 差距：Bomba消防安全安裝審批是馬來西亞所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足Bomba依據UBBL 1984和馬來西亞消防規範的要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向Bomba確認固定式BESS裝置適用的消防規範和標準——包括是否適用NFPA 855或MS 1183（或本地改編版本）——並確定任何馬來西亞專項要求或附加條件；（b）準備符合Bomba要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、消防抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防抑制系統設備經Bomba認可實驗室認證；（d）聘請Bomba注冊消防工程師（Jurutera Keselamatan Kebakaran）進行設計審查和申請提交；（e）在調試前取得地方當局（Pihak Berkuasa Tempatan）竣工合規證書（CCC）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Bomba fire-safety installation approval is required for all commercial and industrial facilities in Malaysia before commissioning; specific BESS fire code adoption (NFPA 855 or MS 1183) has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Bomba
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (Fire and Rescue Department of Malaysia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bomba fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Malaysia. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Malaysia's Bomba requirements under UBBL 1984 and Malaysian fire codes. Engage Bomba and a registered fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code for stationary BESS (including whether NFPA 855 or MS 1183 applies) and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification. Local authority CCC sign-off is required before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Bomba消防安全审批是马来西亚商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足马来西亚依据UBBL 1984和马来西亚消防规范的Bomba要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与Bomba及注册消防工程师接触，确认固定式BESS适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855或MS 1183是否适用）及设计要求。调试前须取得地方当局竣工合规证书（CCC）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Bomba消防安全審批是馬來西亞商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足馬來西亞依據UBBL 1984和馬來西亞消防規範的Bomba要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與Bomba及注冊消防工程師接觸，確認固定式BESS適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855或MS 1183是否適用）及設計要求。調試前須取得地方當局竣工合規證書（CCC）。
